name: wardroai
description: Offline CPU wardrobe and outfit analyzer with Streamlit, OpenCV, MediaPipe fallback zones, SQLite history, and local catalog matching.

scripts.setup: python3 -m venv backend/.venv && bash -c 'source backend/.venv/bin/activate && pip install -r backend/requirements.txt'
scripts.lint: backend/.venv/bin/python -m py_compile app.py backend/analyzer.py backend/catalog_matcher.py backend/database.py backend/main.py scripts/start_streamlit.py && npx eslint frontend/src
scripts.test: npm run test:frontend && npm run test:backend
scripts.security:audit: npm audit --omit=dev && bash -c 'source backend/.venv/bin/activate && pip-audit -r backend/requirements.txt'
